targets.query:
latestSession = from(bucket: "vision_tms")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_tms_session" and r._field == "session_duration_s")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["session"])
  |> group(columns: ["session"])

values = from(bucket: "vision_tms")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_tms_session" and r._field == "session_duration_s")
  |> keep(columns: ["session", "_time", "_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["session"])

join(tables: {values: values, latest: latestSession}, on: ["session"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
    totalSeconds = int(v: r._value)
    minutes = int(v: r._value / 60.0)
    seconds = totalSeconds - minutes * 60
    return {_time: r._time, _value: string(v: minutes) + "m " + string(v: seconds) + "s"}
  })

latestSession = from(bucket: "vision_tms")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_tms_session" and r._field == "session_duration_s")

  |> group(columns: ["session"])

cycles = from(bucket: "vision_tms")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_tms_cycle" and r._field == "duration_s")
  |> keep(columns: ["session", "_time", "_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["session"])

join(tables: {cycles: cycles, latest: latestSession}, on: ["session"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 5)
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

latestSession = from(bucket: "vision_tms")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_tms_session" and r._field == "session_duration_s")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["session"])
  |> group(columns: ["session"])

values = from(bucket: "vision_tms")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vision_tms_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "productive_pct" or r._field == "transition_pct" or r._field == "interruption_pct")
  |> keep(columns: ["session", "_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["session", "_field"])

join(tables: {values: values, latest: latestSession}, on: ["session"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "productive_pct" then "Produtivo" else if r._field == "transition_pct" then "Transição" else "Interrupção"}))
